nasb.text: I will give them a heart to know Me, for I am the Lord; and they will be My people, and I will be their God, for they will return to Me with their whole heart.

esv.text: I will give them a heart to know that I am the Lord, and they shall be my people and I will be their God, for they shall return to me with their whole heart.

cnv.text: 我必賜給他們一顆認識我的心，知道我就是耶和華；他們要作我的子民，我要親自作他們的　神，因為他們必一心歸向我。’”

ccb.text: 我要赐给他们一颗心，使他们认识我是耶和华。他们要做我的子民，我要做他们的上帝，因为他们必全心全意地归向我。’
